review_text: A great spot, close to beach, Finland Brewery and shopping.  Van sites were wide but shallow, so make sure you tell the park your total length so they can allocate accordingly. Showers were like ensuits with a large private shower and loo.  Pool was warm and the bouncy pillow things was covered in children.  We'll be back!
Great location nice people running the park would come back.
Great little caravan park. Loved the town came for 3 nights stayed 7. We found the staff super friendly and helpful every time we wanted to extend. Kids loved the playground and jumping pillow.

Stayed 1 night in one bedroom studio unit , would have stayed longer here but we had to change dates at short notice and they were fully booked.
Staff were very friendly. It was very clean. Short walk to shops and waterfront.

We stayed 5 nights at an ensuite powered suite. Very clean and showers were great!
Handy to walk into town.
Park was clean and quiet.
Staff very helpful and nothing was too much trouble
Highly recommend

Great campsite for day trips.

Very friendly welcome.
The sanitary facilities are clean and adequate. You'll often find yourself in the company of kangaroos and can observe them.

If you're traveling Kalbarri national parks or looking for a quiet relaxing spot in the heart of town then look no further.

Service and amenities maintained to the highest level, staff are incredible.
Will certainly be staying here again next time we're up this way.
Great caravan park, i was given a number of powered sites to pick from which was unreal, staff were helpful and amenities spotless highly recommend we enjoyed our stay. Also great location
Great location. Tidy park. Clean amenities.

BEST HOLIDAY PARK IN KALBARRI 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

Tudor Holiday Park is by far the best Holiday Park in Kalbarri!!
We have just spent 10 nights here & our stay was AMAZING 🤩

The staff are very welcoming & friendly.
The grounds are beautifully kept & the amenities are clean & tidy.

The kids jumping pillow & heated pool are a bonus.
& a special mention the resident bird Fred who was a huge hit with the kids …

Great location - a short walk to the Main Street of town & the beachfront. There is also a skate park &  playground/oval just across the road too.

Park is buzzing with activities during the day & peacefully quiet at nighttime.

We will be back again next year.
Thanks for having us!!!!

HIGHLY RECOMMEND ✅
Nice camp site friendly staff  nice pool not far to beach and shops

Just spent a week in this lovely caravan park on an ensuite site. The park is beautifully maintained with mature, shady trees.
Our ensuite was modern and clean as were the shared amenities.
The pool was an added bonus.
An easy walk to the foreshore, the Pub, tavern and shops, makes this a great location for a stop over.
Great location close to town great amenities very friendly staff stayed 6 nights in our caravan

We stayed two nights in one of there little units it was great had a double bed and two bunk beds would be great for a family stay.
Was very clean and organised with little couch and tv with access to all streaming available with nice little kitchen with great amount of cutlery and glasses etc available for use

Very great location and also has a nice swimming pool and play area for children
Wonderful stay. Nice and clean facilities. I would gladly come back.

Simply the best! Amazing staff, they were warm and friendly. The highlight was the pool, lovely layout, fantastic temperature and the surrounds are beautiful and well maintained. The location is very convenient. I highly recommend Kalbarri Tudor Holiday Park!

Absolutely loved our stay!
We stayed in the off season and stayed with friends so the staff allowed us plenty of room and we were able to park our vans together. Pool was great. Will be back! Thank you
We enjoyed our stay here. good location.

Went their last week with my cousins. It was my first camping experience in Australia. Everything about the campsite was 5 star. The camping ground, toilets, kitchen, shower, pools, amenities, and of course the staffs. Such a lovely and neat park. Definitely coming back next time.

Great park. We stayed in our caravan on a site. Sites are a great size and some of the mats need replacing but I know this will be done over time. Pool was amazing and great place to chat with others. Staff were so helpful and accomodating as we weren’t sure when we could head off to Monkey Mia due to the cyclone. Fred the cocky was cute and loved pats

What a great place to stay. Staff are very friendly and helpful. Amenities are great, pool is excellent and location is perfect. Would highly recommend and we will return
Thanks to everyone
John Nelson

Highly recommend a stay at Kalbarri Tudor Holiday Park. The friendly staff were so helpful and welcoming, the park was lovely and shaded and the swimming pool was great! When the whole town lost power the park were great at keeping guests updated which was really appreciated. We loved our stay here!

Great spot, easy walking distance to town, beach etc with kids. Kangaroos on around the site for a little bit of nature excitement. Kids loved the park, pool, and bouncy pillow.

Was a little windy towards the top end of the park, lots 80>

Amenities decent and clean. Would stay here again for sure.

This is by far the best location in Kalbarri.  Walking distance to all amenities and beaches, pus and restaurants.
The park has great sized sites and tons of room. The blocks, camp kitchen and the brilliant pool are all first rate.
Special call out to Paul and Marina who always went that extra step to engage with the guests and ensure everything was in top order!!
All up one of our top parks in the west coast as part of our lap.

Stayed on a powered site with our motorhome staff were very friendly and helpful.|The site was clean with good facilities spotless toilets and showers. best of all close to beach pubs and the shops.|Will stay again
Caravan sites with power and water. Big site, plenty of room to set up.

Just got home from a great week staying here.
I could not recommend the place enough.
Clean, well maintained with friendly staff and in a great location.
Plenty for the kids to do here as well.
Will definitely be back
Everything was excellent, especially the staff, nothing was too much for them. Special mention of thanks to Mark and Brock
Great people and amenities short walk to town very happy with our stay
Nice clean park and facilities.  Staff and visitors were all friendly. Felt safe leaving items outside and kids exploring the park. Will definitely stay again.
Everything was as stated in site. Very good place for a stat and camp

We had a great stay at Tudor Caravan Park in Kalbarri. The park is well located, clean overall, and close to town, making it a handy base for exploring the area. The grounds are well maintained and the atmosphere is relaxed and family-friendly.
Staff were friendly and welcoming. Amenities were generally good, some of the toilets are a bit iffy, but there are clear signs explaining what you need to do when flushing, which helps avoid any issues.
Overall, a comfortable stay and good value for Kalbarri. We’d stay again and would recommend it to others.

Great shady and quiet spot, all of the staff were helpful and friendly, amenities clean and well looked after. Santa’s visit was loved by the kids (and Adults).
We enjoyed the stay and wouldn’t hesitate to return next time we’re In Kalbarri.

10/10 place to stay, friendly people here and the staff (especially after hours mark and donna) are absolutely amazing very nice people.

would highly recommend xoxo

First time staying in Kalbarri and staff are friendly and very helpful the accomodation was really nice and tidy and kids had heaps fun with jumping pillow and pool and only are 2 min walk to beach great location highly recommend. Thanks Kalbarri Tudor
Shady caravan Park.

This place is one of the many reasons we visit Kalbarri.

The park is always meticulously maintained and the amenities are always clean.

The front desk staff to the camp cleaners and maintenance team are all friendly and do everything they can to help.

If I could give more stars I would.
We liked this family-friendly camping a lot. Pool, planground and jumping pillow for kids, outdoor kitchen, good shower/toilets (without anoying keypad!), laudry... everything you need :-)

We had an ensuite campsite, what a fantastic place to stay. Close to beach, shops, national park. The staff are fantastic very accommodating. I will definitely be going back. Highly recommended staying at Kalbarri Tudor Holiday Park

This caravan park was okay. We stayed only one night. Amenities are clean but the caravan park is a bit out dated. Although it looks like they are taking care of it! Staff was friendly and pool and playground are nice for the kids. It just missed the vibe for us.
Just spent four nights here with our kids. It was the perfect place to stay while we explored Kalbarri. The staff were so friendly and approachable - especially Fred.
Very nice campsite and, above all, clean. Recommended stop!
Really lovely caravan park and friendly, very helpful staff.

Nous avons séjourné dans ce camping deux nuits. Aucune organisation n’y gestion des emplacements ! Le premier soir un couple a décidé de ce mettre sur notre emplacement car le leur ne leur convenait pas. Nous n’avons pas pu joindre la direction et avons été contraint de ce mettre ailleurs. Le lendemain soir même problème, une fois arrivée sur notre emplacement un autre véhicule y étais. L’office avait donné l’emplacement que nous avions réservé a quelqu’un d’autre !!

En dehors de ça les toilettes et les douches étaient propres.
We had a lovely stay and thanks for fixing the shower head very much appreciated 👏
Always a great stay at the Tudor, staff very friendly, pool was great. Best caravan park in Kalbarri walking distance to everything ❤️

Schöner Caravan Park mit großen Bäumen. Kühler Pool mit ca. 20 m Länge, da kann man richtig schwimmen. Außergewöhnliche "en-suite" ähnliche Räume, in denen je 1 Waschbecken + Toilette  + Dusche kombiniert sind, sehr angenehm! Freundlicher Empfang mit dem Angebot "pay 3 stay 4", das wir zum mehrfachen Ausflug in den Kalbarri NP gerne genutzt haben (und das angemessene Preis/ Leistungs-Verhältnis wird noch besser). Abends und morgens manchmal Besuch von Kangaroos - sehr nett. Insgesamt absolut empfehlenswert.

Loved our stay in Kalbarri. The Tudor Park was well positioned with only a short walk into town. The welcome was great, check in easy, the amenities were always clean - what more could you ask for! Older patrons may want to requst to be positiined near the new amenities as the steps to the old block are steep for some.
Kalbarri itself is so beautiful - the ocean, the national park, the wildflowers - thoroughly recommend a visit.
Thank you Tudor holiday park!
Villa units were clean and tidy.

Great park, big sites, clean amenities,  plenty of washing machines and clothes lines, pool big and lovely, staff very helpful. Enjoyed the free drinks voucher for hotel down the road. Very enjoyable stay. 😊

Overpriced, $42 for a tiny unpowered side and overcrowded. 2m away from 3 caravans.
The amenities were fine and the staff kind.
Clean and tidy amenities, but overpriced… we paid 42 bucks for an unpowered, small and overcrowded site

We stayed in a beautiful villa overlooking the  very inviting swimming pool. The villa was clean, comfortable, well equipped and we had a lovely time. The site is a great location too. We would thoroughly recommend a stay and will definitely be back.

We absolutely LOVED our stay here! Maintenance guys lovely, reception staff too. Amenities are well maintained and super clean. Nice grass site and plenty of room. So much for the kids to do - jumping pillow, pool, playground, sand pit etc. Very close to everything Kalbarri has to offer. I have no negative feedback, just all very positive. Definitely recommend.

Siamo stati nel camperground
Molto bello, ordinato, pulito e con spazi comuni ampii e di grande qualitá

Lovely park
Wonderful facilities
Very clean toilets and showers
Very friendly staff

Only small down side was low water pressure but still very good

Thanks for a great stay
Very well run park and really friendly staff

The amenities were clean and showers hot. The camp kitchen was also clean and all stainless bench tops and well set up. They offered wifi and the staff were very friendly and helpful. It was of peak time and my little Staffordshire terrier was also welcome and even got cuddles and pats from staff. I will stay here again when back in Kalbarri.

We stayed in a 1 bedroom chalet. It was clean and very spacious. The park is very well managed with friendly staff and good communication. Great place for families and couples to relax and enjoy all that Kalbarri has to offer. Walking distance to shops, cafes and hotels. Would definitely stay there again when travelling through the area. Highly recommend.

Absolutely loved this campground!
Everything was great – the kitchen, the pool, the hot showers – all super clean and well maintained.
But the most amazing thing about this place is the people who work here.
They are so kind, helpful and genuine – they make the whole experience special.
Honestly, everyone here deserves a raise! 🌟

We had such a good time I forgot to take photos.🤣

One of our favourite campsites. Great location and facilities.
Only downside was we booked two sites under one booking and requested to be side by side but when we arrived there were people in the site in between us.

Great base to explore Kalbarri National Park

Kalbarri Tudor Holiday Park was our twelfth stop on a campervan journey from Broome to Perth in July/August 2025. Coming down from Monkey Mia, we first detoured to Kalbarri National Park before checking in. Nature’s Window and the Kalbarri Skywalk were our first stops — both easily accessible via sealed roads with nearby parking. The views were stunning and definitely among the highlights of our road trip. There’s even a small café at the Skywalk, and our kids were thrilled to find ice cream!

The Holiday Park itself is relatively small, with nicely arranged sites on slightly sloped terrain. Facilities were simple but clean. In the evening, we walked over to Kalbarri Palm Resort — they have a kangaroo feeding area and a Thai restaurant where we picked up a delicious dinner.

It’s also worth strolling to Kalbarri Beach and checking out the nearby surf shop Kalbarri Souvenirs. On our way south the next morning, we stopped at Red Bluff and Eagle Gorge Lookout for some fantastic ocean views.

Loved our stay at Tudor for 5 nights. It was school holidays but it didn't feel overly busy and noisy.
Staff were amazingly friendly and helpful.
Sites were a good size. We had one big rig with us that over hung but it didn't stop anyone from getting around.
Loved the communication texts from the office too.
Would highly recommend it for families. Super close to the foreshore / pubs ect

Great amenities, kept really well.
Even better staff who looked after our needs better than we could ever expect! Friendly and informative. Highly recommended!!

Perfect location just a short walk from Kalbarri Foreshore, there are huge bathrooms with shower, toilet and dry areas for families with small children, plus normal toilet stall areas. Highly recommend, we'd be happy to stay here again.
Great Park. Great staff and amenities. Dump point, camp kitchen, pool and jumping pillow. Short walk to some shops and pubs.
Lovely park and area

Great location, Lovely staff and amazing amenities. We stayed for 3 nights on an ensuite site, bathroom was clean and so convenient. The camp kitchen had everything you needed and the staff always greeted you with a smile. The location is perfect walking distance to everything in the centre of Kalbarri and can’t wait to stay again soon.
We stayed for 2 nights. Could not fault the location, the servie and the place. Thank you. Our kids love the pool and the jumping dome.
Friendly helpful staff. Great location. Updated clean ensuite.  Have been visiting for over 35 years and never disappointed.
Fantastic, friendly staff on reception (plus Fred, a friendly bird). Great cabins! We stayed in Fred’s place and the value was great. Would recommend! Great for families, and those with pets.
Had a great time helpful staff. Nice amenities. Enjoyed our stay
Very friendly. Good size site (160) close to very clean amenities. Short walk to shops & beachfront. Thankyou for accommodating us for 15 nights.

We spent three nights here and were very impressed  with the park. The modern facilities, which were always clean, are among the best we have seen anywhere. The cost for washing machines was reasonably priced. The staff, including those in the grounds, were always friendly and cheerful. I would never hesitate to stay here again.
Great location close to everything. We stayed in a 1 bedroom self contained unit. Everything we needed, clean and nice feel to the holiday park with friendly staff and guests.
We stayed in our caravan. Facilities clean and staff very friendly 👌
Very shelterd and clean. Great hospitality from the staff.

Fantastic big site, didn't feel like you were on top of each other. Older ablutions block but lovely and clean and hot water to showers. Backpackers kitchen/lounge area fabulous.
Didn't use the pool but it looked lovely. All I. All a great park to stay in.

Lovely park with friendly staff close to everything!
Things we loved
Individual shower/toilets
Dog friendly
Heated swimming pool
Off leash fully fenced oval across the road
Some of the sites can be a bit tricky to get into with the trees and a bit unlevel but that's being picky!
Highly recommend

This place is a really great place to stay, would recommend it to anyone looking to stay in the area.  Has a great kids area, camp kitchen, swimming pool and very clean amenities, lots of campsites for all size set ups and within walking distance to the main shops and foreshore
We loved Staying here,beautiful park.Clean amenities and friendly service and park staff.

We stayed here on a powered site and it was a lovely campsite. We had to self check in as we arrived after office hours but it was very easy as the staff had provided a map of where our spot was. We got to meet Fred (the parrot) which was a surprise when we heard a ‘hello’ but no one was there! They were round the corner in their cage! The shower and toilet rooms are great as they are all in one. It’s in a great location as it’s only about a 10 min walk to the beach, pub, bottle shop and restaurants.

Great caravan park well maintained
Staff great . Amenities always clean and up-to-date.  Lot's of trees couldn't fault it
Great caravan park close to town 😊 nice clean amenities and friendly staff 😊 dog friendly 😊🙃😊
Just back from the river and we'll located close to shops etc.  The cabin was comfortable and the staff helpful.  We stayed on a cold night and an extra blanket would have been beneficial
Staff lovely....so pet friendly.....clean neat and tidy......can recommend will stay again ....work at home was calling unfortunately ...did not want to leave
Caravan park was very clean all amenities in excellent condition highly recommend
It is difficult to keep places clean in inclement  weather but the communal showers were in need of a refresh . A bit mouldy and filthy extraction fans .
calm & clean 🌞
Brilliant caravan park. Clean, quiet, close to everything,  great children's equipment and a beautiful pool. The staff couldn't do enough for you. So friendly.
Excellent.

Great place to stay, just off the main road, booking was easy, the staff were fantastic and really nice, easy to park the van and well wind protected. Loved it!
David & Petra 👍👍👍

We loved our stay.Very happy with service and accomodation.
Will be back again
My parents stayed here.  Service was fantastic and arranged to forward left behind items for my parents to their next location at no extra cost.  Couldn't rate more highly
The van park is neat clean and tidy. Not overly large but has enough amenities in good order. Lots of play equipment for kids and a heated pool.

Super camping proche du parc national de Kalbarri. 40$ unpowered et 50$ powered.
Douche propres et grandes. Cuisine basique mais très fonctionnelle !
Great camp kitchen. Plenty of kangaroos in the area.
Great location, friendly staff & very helpful.  Walking distance to cafes

We enjoyed our stay in Brick Unit 1, which was fairly spacious, well-organized, and equipped with all the basic amenities exactly as described in the booking details. It was also spotlessly clean. We especially appreciated that the toilet and shower areas were separate, which added convenience. The beds were comfortable, with clean, good-quality linen and quilts provided. A special mention goes to the friendly front office staff—when I had trouble opening the door one afternoon, they quickly sent an attendant over to open the door for me. The location was also excellent, just a short walk from the town’s main tourist and shopping hub. Another incident of likings: on our way back to the unit after a late-night walk around 10 p.m., we were pleasantly surprised to encounter a herd of kangaroos in front of the reception area.

Disliked:  The roads inside the premises need repairing. The old signage at the entry is difficult to read, needing a repainting too. The road erosion in front of our unit resulted in long-term storage of rainwater, which was not enjoyable. The brick units are located at the end of one of the caravan parking strips. We had limited park space because the neighboring tourists did not leave any space at all when they parked their big caravan next to our unit. In the peak season (mid-July) with packed tourists, we could not manage to connect to the net using the free wifi for a moment.
We stayed in our Caravan on this site.Really friendly staff, helped find extra  nights for us as we extended our stay.Really good location into town too.
Brilliant resort

Good little camping spot! Conveniently located — close to lots of places but nicely sheltered from the sea breeze.

Check-in and check-out were smooth with great communication via text. Toilets and showers were generally clean and well looked after, and the hot showers were great!

Wi-Fi worked well throughout the site, which was a bonus. And Fred — he's awesome!

I can’t recommend this campsite enough. I’ve stayed at other campsites in Kalbarri but none of them compare to this. The abolition block is a bit dated but it is excellent condition and spotlessly clean. The camp kitchen and tv areas are awesome and the staff are fantastic. We will definitely be back!

The campground is beautiful, with clean and accessible facilities. The staff is incredibly friendly and always willing to help with anything you need, which made the stay even more enjoyable. At night, you can see kangaroos coming close to feed on leaves and grass.

We were allocated a nice large van spot up the back. Nice & quiet , easy to back into. Close to all that one needs to see , eat & drink. Staff were helpfull with various info... We would stay there again.
Très beau camping, très bien équipé, grande cuisine, barbecue, buanderie, sanitaires grands et très propres, grande aire de jeux pour les enfants, piscine.. bien placé pour visiter le  National park

Quiet plenty of room and excellent facilities. I’m going back there. Easy walk to beach and pubs.
Love it.
Terry
Very nice camping! The bathrooms and showers are clean and the staff around is always available to help!

Great little park.
Friendly reception staff.
Good caravan site.
Friendly staff, clean facilities, close to everything. Definitely return.
Beautiful place and friendly staff. Walking distance to town where everything is laid on.  Love it

Having booked this over 12 months (2024) ago and when travelling here 18th May 2025 for four nights was reading other reviews on TripAdvisor arriving with apprehension as they were not great reviews!|I can say with full honesty I don’t know what they are talking about as we have found the staff to be lovely and helpful, our ensuite site (E8) spotless and smelt clean also, having used the laundry facilities on more than one occasion the machines were spotless, lots of washing line space for guests. Caravan surrounds are well kept and ground staff were friendly.||Is in walking distance to town centre and would highly recommend Gorges Cafe. ||Evening for dinner best to book we didn’t come across anything outstanding just typical pub meals. The Finlay’s brewery was tasty and best value for tshirts we found.||Kalbarri souvenir shop is best for holiday tshirts over the tourist bureau (we bought at the tourist bureau).||Pelican feed each morning is a must what a laugh, the coastline outstanding.
Perfect stay! We loved this park
Fantastic Park close to all attractions and amenities friendly helpful staff great prices the place to stay when in Kalbarri

Sehr nett, sauber und die Duschen sind extra groß.
Sehr Freundliches Personal und der Pool ist sehr sauber.
Nah am Beach und am Nationalpark.

I camped here for a night passing through and I wish I had stayed longer. Waking up to the birds and kangaroos and within walking distance to the beach, cafes and pub. The perfect spot and the guys that helped me with a last minute booking are amazing! Your kindness made my day, thank you. Will definitely be back 😊
This park is a very quiet park lovely pool spacious amenities clean tide sites & very reasonable prices & as it is a G'day park if you have a membership it becomes a little cheaper so bonus

The amenities were dirty, the showers were filthy. The laundry was disgusting, I doubt that it had been cleaned in months. I was very disappointed as this place isn't what you would call cheap. I definitely would not stay there again and I would not recommend it. G'day should get their act together.

We stayed overnight in a cabin here. The cabin was clean and spacious with no problems. At $200 it was a little expensive we thought but it seems to be the way it is these days.The park itself looked very good and there were a lot of vans there even though it was slightly off season. It's a short walk from the main area, a bit out of the way but nothing to be worried about.

Been in a lot worse caravan parks, also a lot better.  $50 a night for unpowered should be up there as best, its not.  No washing up liquid in camp kitchen, no dishclothes/sponges etc.  We carry our own but backpackers had sinks of very greasy hot water.  No mops in showers, meant walking onto others sandy, dirty footprints.  Place was half empty, better price and we'd have stayed another night, but we moved on. Just reduce price on weekdays out of school holidays.

Its not a bad park the angle from road to campiste made it hard to hitch and un hitch the camper.  The Toukley shower blocks were filthy daily almost feel sick to go shower needs a clean few times day especially being holidays . Or upgrade  them  pool was nice commomarea nice seen them cleaning there daily so non-seasonal can't do showers toilets to . Close to skate parks shops and beach .

Fish n ships in town big let down pizza was really good .

If you stay here maybe just take your own token shower set up and will.be ok

Good park for families. Lots of trees, nice pool. Had an ensuite site but the tree at the back of the site made it tricky for our large caravan. Trees were planted the same position on most sites but won’t affect most people. Ensuite was awesome, we felt very spoilt. Pretty quiet and close to town.

We stayed at this campground for 8 nights because our car broke down, on an unpowered site, and honestly, this place is seriously lacking in cleanliness. In 8 days, we never once saw a proper cleaning being done, except for one time when someone vacuumed the common area.

There are two toilet blocks, both equally filthy. Toilet paper on the floor all week, rubbish in the toilets and showers, and even faeces stains in the loos. For $50 a night, we expected at least a basic level of cleanliness. The pool was definitely not cleaned daily—the bottom was dirty, and we only saw the pool vacuum being used once.

To top it off, on our last night, someone had taken our campsite even though we had left our belongings there. The receptionist, while apologetic, asked us if we could move instead of trying to contact the other guest or find them in the campground. In the end, we had to track them down and ask them to move to their assigned spot.

On the plus side, the pool was nice and refreshing, especially with the heat during our stay, and the staff were friendly.
Brilliant place, great hispitality, good ambiance
Great stay, would definitely go back again
We had an awesome stay   Best little weekender   Never disappoints

We were there for two days and unfortunately it was not as we had imagined it. When we arrived on the first day in the morning and checked in, we were directly assigned a place where we stood with our camper for two hours. After this time we wanted to go on a hike in the park and solve our things on our burst stand and lead with our camper off to the hike. We came back after a few hours and suddenly there were tents on our burst that was given to us for two days and that we had already paid for. We then went directly to the reception, which was closed. Fortunately for us, the people who were standing on our door found another employee and asked him about it. Our daughter, who spoke English the best of us, tried to describe the situation to the employee from our point of view. He wanted to give us a burst in an oblique position and without a sitting surface. We were happy that our daughter could still explain to him that we would like to have a similar burst as the one that was previously secured and had paid for us. We were therefore not very satisfied with the stay and the helpfulness of the employees. Since they admitted at the end that they knew that the burst was occupied and still passed it on because they could not reach us.
We absolutely loved this park. We had an ensuite site that was very modern and clean. The staff were very helpful.big sotes

Very friendly service when booking a site over the phone. Nice and clean park, top maintained pool. The bath rooms (combined toilet, shower, was basin like a bathroom at home) were really special and clean. Pet friendly, and some local kangaroos were hopping around the park as well.

I have been coming to this park forever. This trip I brought the Traveller Caravans WA group for our annual weekend away. The staff were very helpful with the group booking. All our vans were located together as per my request on my initial inquiries. The pool is great, not just a domestic pool it is actually sized appropriately for a park of it's capacity. It is heated and has plenty of shade around and over the pool.
The ablutions are all family style with shower, toilet and wash basin in each of the ten suites. There is an older style block as well that is properly cleaned daily. Camp kitchen and TV lounge are great.
Highly recommend for your next stay.
Ideal location for kalbarri area. Plenty to do here. Site walking dustance to seafront and all amenities. Everything you need when touring along the WA coast.
Great park. Staff very friendly and have lots of info on area. Clean toilets and great shower units with own toilet and basin cubicle. Fabulous idea.

An absolutely wonderful caravan park. Our favourite so far on our travels around Australia. Nice & quiet, spacious sites with beautiful trees & shade, close to the town (you can easily walk everywhere), excellent amenities & a magnificent playground, jumping pillow, pool & camp kitchen. Very happy kids which means very happy parents! All of the staff are very friendly & helpful. Cannot recommend this park enough!
A great holiday park for the family. Pool is heated. Fantastic place to stay with really friendly staff.

Showers/toilets: partly new and very clean
Pool: sufficiently large and clean
Playground: sufficiently large and varied
Kitchen and BBQ stations: sufficiently available and tidy, clean
Camping site: very tidy
Staff: very nice and helpful

Criticism: do you have to drag the garbage cans through the camp at 7am? Can't this be arranged differently? (the evening before). Do you have to start working with a chainsaw at 7:45 am? Maybe one or two people want to sleep longer? We are on vacation and nothing else. Unfortunately, that wasn't good.
The proximity to the main road is also unfavorable, but that can't be helped.

Unfortunately, one cockatoo is locked in a cage at the entrance. Very sad, especially when you see the wild conspecifics. Only freedom is species-appropriate.

If you work on the points of criticism, I could recommend the camp.

Booked 4 night stay at Kalbarri Tudor holiday park during summer school holidays , the park was beautifully maintained and all staff were amazing.The park has a large pool, A huge jumping pillow, the park put on different activities for the kids including face painting and icy poles. They even cooked up a free breakfast for everyone.
Thank you Kalbarri Tudor staff for the wonderfull stay .
We can’t wait to be back to visit

Stayed on ensuited powered site. Clean amenities, great pool and playground with shaded areas for kids.
Even had a bacon and egg roll cooked for us one morning by staff!
Will definitely be back!

Great caravan park for families. We stayed first couple of weeks in January and aside from the pool and playground they offered other activities for the young ones. Colouring and photography competition a lawn games morning with face painting. Ablutions were clean along with campers kitchen. It was a short walk to foreshore, bakery and pubs. I would definitely recommend and would stay again when visiting.
We booked an unpowered campsite which was perfect for a car and two tents. Nice and easy late check in and the after hours guard was very responsive and kind.

Had a great stay in one of the deluxe villas with the family.  It was very comfortable and the aircon was fabulous in the warm weather.  Bbq, table and chairs on the balcony was lovely for cooking outside.  The park has a beautiful outdoor pool and jumping pillow for the kids. We enjoyed watching the emu and kangaroos go up the road from our balcony.  Close to town and the foreshore.

Had an absolutely shocking experience at this place. First off, the French chick working there was going on about how you could get free showers at night. It was so disrespectful, honestly. She said it like it was some sorta trick, and she was almost bragging about it. Totally unprofessional, and it made the whole place feel uncomfortable. She basically encouraged people to sneak in and use the service without paying. On top of that, the place was filthy and totally disorganised. It was clear they couldn’t care less about maintaining a clean environment. The staff seemed more interested in chatting amongst themselves than actually doing their job.
I won’t be coming back, and I’d seriously recommend giving this joint a miss. The lack of respect and the dodgy attitude from the staff left me feeling really uncomfortable. Not a place I’d want to return to.
Nice place to rest up

What a beautiful place to be. Straight across from the ocean
Staff friendly as. Walking distance to the pubs.
Was going to stay 2 nights but staying for 4..Lots of places to see. Still here but definitely be back
Great place to stay in kalbarri. Staff very helpful and friendly.  Amenities and whole park very well maintained

It was okay!||Fantastic for families but for us we found it very expensive for an unpowered site considering how tight the spots are etc!||The facilities are fantastic, very clean with a nice pool, park and bounce pillow for kids. There was also some music arranged the night we arrived which was a lovely atmosphere.
On arrival, staff very helpful
Great location, the holiday park has a playground and pool. It's located 5 minutes walk from the river, a great place to stay
Bathrooms are dated and caravan bays are small. Otherwise good. Friendly staff
We have nice stay.

When we arrived at this park we had seen the photos and thought it looked amazing.  we were staying 5 nights so we had high hopes|The staff were super friendly and helpful.  Once we entered the park the photos looked nothing like what the actual park was like.  Everything is so old and worn and in need of a desperate update.  The toilets are unisex and in the mornings its chaos as everyone needs to use them but there arent enough for the amount of people at the park.  The caravan sites are very small and really difficult to get into.  They have dirt on one side and a grass pad on the other.  You need to make sure you have a long power cord and water as the taps and power point are a long one from where your van will be.  We got put at the top of the road right next to a tree - which kept dropping big branches on our van all the time - and cause of the position of the site we had to raise our van up as high as it would go to make it level.  Made it really hard when we were leaving as we couldnt get the van back on the car|The park is very noisy at night and often wildlife will roam around.|It is very very crowded so make sure you both well in advance.  For a Gday park it is very disappointing.|It is a fair way from the shopping areas.

I stayed here for nearly two weeks and it was a pleasure. The receptionist is super kind and accommodating when we asked to extend our stay. The 7th night was even free as a bonus!

Washrooms are cleaned regularly and in good condition. They have a nice pool that is getting a heater installed soon as well. Good sites with some shade, would stay again without hesitation. It's also close to the beach and other amenities in town.
Very friendly and clean amenities,good work guys 🙂🙂🌅🌅

Beautiful place, quite and big.
Beautiful bathroom and swimming pool.

Just be careful what you book if you are in a tent, lots of good points about this park.|We pre booked about 6 weeks beforehand and told them that we are new to camping and would like a tent site.|When we arrived it was very windy and our site was straight up the driveway on the corner to the left.  It felt like sitting on a median strip so we went back to the office and asked for something a lil sheltered from the wind for our tent.|We were then moved to site 39 which has a concrete pad and the rest is just dirt, no mesh on top.  We were told that there were no others we could move to.|Next to us were site 40 and 41, 41 being perfect, next to a villa, a lil more privacy, green grass and nice mesh pad.  We watched that spot sit empty for the two nights we were there while we padded about in dirt which was very unpleasant. Site 40 was occupied on the last night of our stay when a single guy in a camper van arrived late and enjoyed some green matting and grass even though he had a van however I’m not sure whether he just rocked up randomly as it was after office hours and you can just drive in and use the facilities which are not locked. |Otherwise, the facilities were good, laundry and clotheslines good, I liked the toilet and showers being in one and never had to wait.  On one occasion the floor was floating in water and I had to push it down the drain and next morning around 7am there were two toilets with no toilet paper when everyone is waking up and wanting to use the facilities.|Kangaroos visited but not a problem for us.|My suggestion if in a tent, make sure what kind of site you are booking, lesson learnt for us.  Location was good, easy walk to shops etc. |anyone coming here would have a car so the distance to IGA or anywhere in Kalbarri isn’t an issue.

This caravan park has unisex amenities, as well as single sex toilets. The amenities are clean and roomy. The sites are easy to access and have either shade cloth or concrete slabs. The power and taps are closer to one site than the other and this makes it hard to connect unless you have 20 meter hose and lead.

We stayed two nights in a ensuite caravan site nice big site sand with cement slab and shady trees, ensuite was fairly new and reasonably clean can’t comment on the general amenities blocks as we did not use them, wifi excellent and good tv reception, not the closest caravan park to town/beach but also not far away within walking distance would recommend.
Booked a powered site in mid August. Gets pretty crowded but great overall. Hot showers and bathrooms are really spacious and clean, such a bonus.
화장실이랑 샤워장 붙어있는 스위트 사이트로 이용했는데 최고였습니다 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 로드트립하면서 묵은 곳중 제일 만족

Not sure why we had to pay for kids. Nothing for them to do. Pillow and pool both out of action.
Your only saving grace is that your staff were so bloody lovely

Toller Campingplatz mit einer super Lage. Man ist häufig in Gesellschaft von Kängurus und kann diese beobachten.
Die Sanitäranlagen waren etwas alt, aber total okay.
A lovely campsite, reasonable prices and nice facilities

Beautiful place, overall 3 stars.
The park definitely needs some attention, very old equipment that needs some attention,we only booked because they had a jumping pillow, if the jumping pillow was not around there will be nothing for the kids to do, non heated swimming pool so was empty, the whole time, jumping pillow was closed every morning, no one in the park cared about the 5k speed limit, staff were very friendly which was great! We met some lovely people in the park which is always great..
Thanks for the stay

Great holiday park, we'll definitely stay there again if we go back but we'll be staying in a powered site without the ensuite. The only issue I had was we paid for a powered ensuite site because we're a family of 5 and thought it would be easier with the kids only to discover that we had a block of 4 showers and the hot water tank was smaller than my 4 year old. The shower had no pressure and I mean no pressure and the hot water ran out half way thru kid number 3's shower. Not to mention for the first 2 nights there was a family of 4 sharing the same hot water system. After the first night I checked out the ablution block and was very happy with the water pressure and we all had warm showers which didn't run cold.

Overall not a bad park but has 2 different sections one side newer and better set up other side needs attention.Booked for stay 4 pay 3 deal which was good value.On arrival was told I'm on an RVSite which would be ok for my van ,asked if had room to put out awning and was assured no problem.Once on site a tree blocked off part of the site and when awning put out it intruded on next site could not even put out ropes then had a camper put next to us which nearly ended up under our awning.

Spent 3 nights here in our caravan, check in was a breeze and all the staff we encountered were friendly.  Super clean toilet/showers
Top effort

Absolutely loved it! Such modern clean facilities, kids loved the pool and chill out I doors area and made heaps of friends. Great location for ease of getting around town. Would definitely stay here again! Thank you 🙏

Hello! We are a Korean family who used to travel by camper van. We stayed here in February, and we almost slept hot and dark due to the breakdown of our camper van's electrical system. At the time, manager Warren helped to solve this bad problem, and eventually, when it didn't work out, he provided us with a studio. My family is so grateful for Warren's warm heart and leaves a late review.
Do you remember my family? Thanks to you, we made good memories in Australia. Thank you !
PS. Cute kangaroos appear here at night 🦘❤️
Nice an clean rooms with everything in there that you need 👌

We recently stayed in a powered ensuite site. Over all the stay was great so I’ll break down the pros and cons-
PRO:
-amazing play equipment and pool for kids
-ensuite was clean and tidy
- regular ablution blocks were family and disability friendly
-camp kitchen was cleaned regularly and well maintained.
- service was amazing, all staff members were happy and friendly

CONS:
- the site was only dirt, no grass which was a real let down
- the lights for the ensuite are sensor lights which meant anytime you sat on the toilet or had a shower you had to dance out a YMCA type rhythm with your arms to stop the lights going off 😂

Over all had a great stay

Camping au top!
Près de tout, acceuil agréable et camping très bien entretenu

Sanitaire propre!
Je recommande !

We recently stayed overnight at this holiday park in an unpowered site with our 6-meter-long, 2.2-meter-wide caravan. We found the space to be quite tight, especially in width. Additionally, the washing and drying machines did not perform well; our clothes came out less clean than expected and were still damp.

Despite these issues, the customer service was great, and we appreciated the facilities such as the ensuite bathrooms, showers, and camp kitchen.

Arrived late so info waiting outside for us. Found our site but already in use - apparently the people had told the office earlier they were changing spot. Our site unfortunately was not level & we had no levelling options.

Didn't see any staff during our 2 day stay.

Park is nice - large trees, sloping block & quiet. Amenities are excellent - separate men's/women's toilets as well as individual unisex toilet/shower rooms.

Good bbqs, pool (large, cool with shade), bouncy pillow & playground. Newish cabins available.

Short walk to coast, pubs & shops. Easy drive to National  Parks. Very quiet stay.
Everything are always clean and good!

The best campsite that we’ve stayed at! Inside kitchen was a god send with the wind and flies recently. Lovely atmosphere across the camp.
Great location, short walk into Kalbarri to watch the pelicans and get coffee.
We stayed for 2 nights in an ensuite site. It was nice and clean and the park facilities were great. The pool area was very neat and tidy. Will definitely stay here again.

Good, honest Caravan Park.
Sites could do with some TLC.
But great amenities. Showers and toilets are great as were the camp kitchen and BBQ facilities.

Nous avons séjourné ici en mars 2024. Le camping est agréable et bien équipé. La piscine est un peu froide mais à le mérite d’être bien entretenue et rafraîchissante. Le parc est agréable, on peut voir plein de kangourous et de beaux oiseaux. La cuisine est bien équipée également. Les sanitaires sont propres.

Toller Campingplatz und freundliche Leute.
Fred, die ältere Kakdudame, ist ein Highligt für die Kinder😉.
Sehr sauber, toller Pool, freundliche Leute, Kängurus hüpfen Abends und Morgens durch den Park.

The only park I went (I went to a total of 7!) That has parking on the gravel, instead of concrete. The park was quiet and walking distance to the beach and some eateries. Small nice town to spend a night. Service was excellent and noticed the park management do their rounds before closing and in the morning.

Wild kangaroos sighted! Scary in the night hahaha when they stared at you. Toliet/showering well-maintained.
사진보다 객실이 의외로 좋아서 놀랐음. 정원의 캥거루와 새가 예쁘고 나무들이 정말 크고 아름답다. 시골의 캠핑장에 왔다는 열린 마음으로 보면 모든것이 좋다.

We stayed 4 nights powered ensuite camp site on our first night was really windy trying to set up rang after hours number and spoke with Louis even though it was after hours she was great helping us out with finding another campsite not so wind and let us still keep the ensuite bathrooms that we had paid for. Awesome pool area, and all amenities lovely park highly recommend will be back 👍👍👍

We stayed for 1 night here with Motorhome. First of all, our site was taken by another caravan since that camper got the same number as us.. it was late 6:30pm  but tried to call few times, the problem was solved

Great amenities, friendly and welcoming staff.
Toilet n shower were as good as five-star hotel.
Love this park. Clean..good facilities..lovely staff and short walk to town. Come back every year.

I stayed 6 nights at unpowered site,very happy with my stayed.😄And there’s a tv room where I can charge my phone with.
Good shady camp spot,have kangaroos around sometimes.
Facilities are all clean and well maintenance.
Friendly staffs.
Short walk to beach and restaurants.

We stayed 5 nights in the playground cabins. Cabins are super clean and perfect for our family of 4.  Reception staff were very friendly and efficient right through from initial booking until we left. The maintenance fellow fixed a small issue immediately and with a big friendly smile. Playground and pool was a hit with kids, so too the kangaroos and galahs. Walking/bike riding distance to the main foreshore and shops. Kalbarri is a beautiful, relaxing place for a holiday, we have stayed in a few different places in Kalbarri. The Tudor is our favourite, we'll definitely be back😊
Kangaroos on the campground. Good place to stay with kids.
We had an ensuite site, was very clean and well stocked. Beautiful pool and sealed road. Playground and jumping pillow were being updated. Staff were very friendly and helpful.

Unfortunately wasn’t able to stay here due to the cyclones that hit in 2021, staff were very unreliable with communication and untrustworthy as they went back on their word. Did not give a refund even though it was stated that if we didn’t use the credit we would get the refund after that date. Will not be staying here in the future or recommending it. Will only be going to places with reliable and trustworthy people.

Very disappointing with a strict no-budge booking policy. A very rare family holiday went pear shaped due to unforeseen circumstances and with more than a few days notice (with a certainty of reselling the site however not leaving them in the lurch during peak times) they would not provide a credit, refund or transfer for our site. This hurts us very much financially and I don’t recommend booking here unless you’re prepared to throw your money away if you fall ill and can’t make it. Very disappointing indeed.

This caravan park is close to beach and shops without being right in town. Well set out sites all facilities are well maintained and clean. Lots for kids to do with playground and pool. There is a skate park just across the road. Kid and pet friendly. A quiet relaxing place for just a break or short stay.

Arrived late after 7 hours of straight driving with hungry teenagers in the back and a caravan in tow all exhausted on grandfinal night and no where else to go ... the crew at Kalbarri Tudour couldn't have been more helpful, understanding and friendly, they really saved us !  Thankyou Kalbarri Tudor !!

Excellent place for campers, caravans & cabins.
A short walk to the middle of Kalbarri
Great spot for the family to relax!
Excellent caravan park with plenty of space. Good amenities. Just 1 suggestion, get a larger TV in the living area

Lovely clean and quiet park only issue is the grey water drainage hole is half a foot higher than the ground, so never going to work. Staff are is happy, and it's dog friendly, a huge bonus. Thanks for having us.
We were in a caravan and enjoyed our  stay here. It is clean and staff is very helpful. It's worth staying here.
Great park. Handley to town
Great facilities
Awesome pet friendly caravan park with very helpful staff. Really enjoyed our stay here, would thoroughly recommend
Hidden gem,  we had a lovely grassy spot. Quiet a nice park, more room  than anticipated and the staff were very friendly. Would recommend it.
Cute little caravan park! Has everything you need, clean facilities, close to town.
We stayed in one of the Pelicans rest cabins for 4 nights and it was great! The staff were lovely at check in. The place was quiet clean and well maintained. Would definitely stay again!
Clean and tidy facilities.
Well situated comfortable park
Excellent place with lovely young lady at reception who was very willing to help. Love Kalbarri, it's the cleanest place we have been to yet.
Owner have no sense how to talk with others , we traveled all the way from Perth , he almost ruined our plan.

We stayed at this site for two nights as a group with young kids as young as 3 year old. Didn’t have good experience, as we had to cut short our holidays because the management kicked us out on third morning for not reading the 2 pages of site policies. we were given evict notice without any warning or chance to rectify, as we were found in breach of site policy of not to stake pegs through site matts. The site has multiple matts with hundreds of holes, but due to some reasons the management was quick to pick on us and asked us to evict.

The management claimed that we were verbally told about the policy on arrival, but it was not the case.
Not a friendly place  for groups especially for kids …. had the worst ever camping experience here.. ruined our holidays
Jodie brilliant park fantastic 👏
Back from the beach. Good sites, some shade, clean amenities and nice hot water. Recommended.
